en: ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ ♪ What a wonderful phrase ♪
♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ ♪ It ain't no passing craze ♪
♪ It means no worries ♪ ♪ For the rest of your days ♪
♪ It's our problem free ♪ ♪ Philosophy ♪
♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ - [Simba] Hakuna Matata?
ko: 하쿠나 마타타? 그게 뭔데?

en: - [Pumbaa] Yeah, it's our motto. - What's a motto?
ko: 응, 우리 좌우명이야. - 좌우명이 뭔데?

en: - Nothing, what's a motto with you? - Nice. - Boom!
ko: 별거 아니야, 너한테 좌우명이 뭔데? - 오 좋아. - 붐!

en: - Those two words will solve all your problems.
ko: 이 두 단어가 네 모든 문제를 해결해 줄 거야.

en: - Yeah, take Pumbaa here. Why.
ko: 응, 여기 품바를 봐. 왜냐면.

en: ♪ When he was a young warthog ♪
♪ When I was a young warthog ♪ (gasping) - How you feeling?
ko: 기분이 어때?

en: - It's an emotional story. ♪ He found his aroma lacked a certain appeal ♪
ko: 감동적인 이야기라서.

en: ♪ He could clear the savanna after every meal ♪ ♪ I'm a sensitive soul ♪ (gas bubbling)
♪ Although I seem thick-skinned ♪ ♪ And it hurt ♪
♪ That my friends never stood downwind ♪ - I was always here for you, and I resent that.
ko: 난 항상 네 곁에 있었는데, 섭섭하다.

en: ♪ And oh, the shame ♪ ♪ Yes, he was ashamed ♪ ♪ I thought of changing my name ♪ I mean, to what, Brad?
ko: 이름을 바꿀까 생각했어. 뭐로? 브래드?

en: ♪ And I got downhearted ♪ ♪ Every time that I farted ♪
- Are you gonna stop me? - No, I'm not, you disgust me.
ko: 말릴 거야? - 아니, 안 말려, 넌 역겨워.

en: (passing gas) ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪
♪ What a wonderful phrase ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪
♪ Ain't no passing craze ♪
♪ It means no worries for the rest of your days ♪ - [Pumbaa] Yeah, sing it, kid.
ko: 그래, 불러봐 꼬마야.

en: ♪ It's our problem free ♪ ♪ Philosophy ♪
♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ (waterfall roaring)
- [Timon] Welcome to our humble home. - [Simba] You live here?
ko: 우리의 소박한 집에 온 걸 환영해. - 여기서 살아?

en: - [Timon] Well, we live wherever we want. - [Pumbaa] We do as we please. - [Simba] It's beautiful.
ko: 우린 원하는 곳 어디서든 살아. - 하고 싶은 대로 해. - 아름답다.

en: - [Pumbaa] Yeah, it's really nice, huh?
ko: 응, 정말 좋지?

en: - Everyone, this is Simba.
ko: 여러분, 심바야.

en: - That, my friend, is a lion. - What about food? Have you thought about feeding that thing?
ko: 친구야, 저건 사자잖아. - 먹이는? 저걸 뭘 먹일 건지 생각해 봤어?

en: - Yeah, I'm starved. I could eat a whole zebra. (gasping) - Oh, here we go.
ko: 응, 배 너무 고파. 얼룩말 한 마리는 먹겠어. - 아, 또 시작이다.

en: - Uh, no, no, no. Kid, we're fresh outta zebra. - Any antelope?
ko: 아, 아니 아니 아니. 꼬마야, 얼룩말 다 떨어졌어. - 영양은?

en: - Uh-oh. - No, listen kid, if you wanna live with us, you have to eat like us.
ko: 이런. - 아니, 들어봐 꼬마야, 우리랑 살려면 우리처럼 먹어야 해.

en: - And most importantly, not eat us.
ko: 그리고 제일 중요한 건, 우릴 먹으면 안 돼.

en: - [Timon] This looks like a good spot to rustle up some grub.
ko: 여기가 벌레 잡기 좋은 곳이네.

en: (breaking log) - Yeah! - Perfect. - Step aside, fellas.
ko: 좋아! - 완벽해. - 비켜봐, 친구들.

en: (groans) - What's that? - Ooh, crunchy. - This one's got some nuttiness.
ko: 그게 뭐야? - 오, 바삭해. - 이건 고소한 맛이 나.

en: - Mm. Now that's what I call umami. (slurping) - Slimy, yet satisfying.
ko: 음, 이게 바로 감칠맛이지. - 미끌미끌하지만 맛있어.

en: - Mm, extra crunchy. - They're local. - Oh, are they?
ko: 음, 엄청 바삭해. - 로컬산이야. - 오, 진짜?

en: - They're from right there. - I'm telling you, kid, this is the great life.
ko: 바로 저기서 나온 거야. - 진짜야, 꼬마야, 이게 최고의 삶이야.

en: No rules, no responsibilities. Ooh.
ko: 규칙도 없고, 책임도 없어. 오.

en: (gasping) The little cream-filled kind. I love these. - Those are good.
ko: 크림 들어간 거다. 나 이거 좋아해. - 그거 맛있지.

en: - I love these. - Those are the best. - [Animal] Could I have the head? - Well, kid?
ko: 나 이거 좋아해. - 그게 제일 맛있어. - 머리 줄 수 있어? - 어때, 꼬마야?

en: - Oh, well. Hakuna Matata.
ko: 에라 모르겠다. 하쿠나 마타타.

en: (chewing) (gulps) Slimy,
ko: 미끌미끌하지만

en: yet satisfying. - That's it.
ko: 맛있어. - 바로 그거야.

en: - We didn't lie. (squeaking)
ko: 거짓말 안 했지.

en: - [Animal] Egg sack, I got an egg sack.
ko: 알주머니다, 알주머니 찾았어.

en: ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪
♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ ♪ It means no worries ♪
♪ For the rest of your days ♪
♪ It's our problem free ♪ ♪ Philosophy ♪
♪ Hakuna Matata, oh ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata, yeah ♪
♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata, oh, oh ♪ ♪ Ah ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪
♪ It means no worries ♪ ♪ For the rest of your days ♪ ♪ Hakuna Matata ♪
♪ It's our problem free ♪ ♪ Philosophy ♪
♪ Hakuna Matata ♪ - [Simba] One more time.
ko: 한 번 더!

en: - [Timon] Oh no, I think we did it. - [Pumbaa] I think we got this one, yeah.
ko: 아 됐어, 다 한 것 같아. - 이거 잘 된 것 같아, 응.

en: - [Simba] But we're just getting in the groove. - [Timon] No, let's leave 'em wanting more.
ko: 이제 막 흥이 나는데. - 아니, 아쉬울 때 끝내는 거야.

en: - [Pumbaa] Yeah, you've grown 400 pounds since we started. - [Timon] Meanwhile, I look exactly the same.
ko: 너 노래 시작한 이후로 200키로나 쪘어. - 반면에 나는 그대로지.

en: ♪ It means no worries ♪ - [Pumbaa] Will you tell him to stop? ♪ Oh ♪ - [Timon] Well, you insisted we sing the song.
ko: 좀 그만하라고 해 줄래? - 네가 노래하자고 했잖아.

en: - [Pumbaa] I insisted? You started singing it! - [Timon] Well, it's our signature song.
ko: 내가? 네가 먼저 불렀잖아! - 우리 대표곡이잖아.

en: We shouldn't be sharing it with everyone. - [Pumbaa] But it's our signature song so we have to.
ko: 아무한테나 알려주면 안 돼. - 대표곡이니까 불러야지.

en: Look, (sighs) just tell him to stop. ♪ It means no worries ♪ - [Timon] Oh, now he's riffing.
ko: 그냥 그만하라고 해. - 이제 즉흥까지 하네.

en: Pumbaa, this is a nightmare. - [Pumbaa] It actually is kinda getting better.
ko: 품바, 이건 악몽이야. - 사실 좀 나아지고 있는데.
